values: Trekkers who are slow may struggle to keep up with the team
Being unfit causes you to miss out on the deep, transformative experience Indiahikes designs

evidence.quote_or_summary: You struggle to be a part of the team because you're slow.
You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs for you.

values: Walk, jog, or run 5 km in under 32 minutes
At least 3 runs from the last 1 month must meet the trek's fitness criteria

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Khopra Ridge Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 32 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.
Ensure that at least 3 runs from the last 1 month meet the fitness criteria of your specific trek.

values: Fitness approval from the Indiahikes team is required 20 days before the trek date
Only running, jogging, or walking are accepted as fitness proofs; cross-training workouts are not considered valid
Upload a public profile link from apps like Strava or Nike Run Club showing at least 3 qualifying runs in the last month

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
Paste your profile's link on your Indiahikes account (your profile has to be public). Ensure that at least 3 runs from the last 1 month meet the fitness criteria of your specific trek.

values: 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins
A 6-week plan is provided for trekkers who are not currently active

evidence.quote_or_summary: All you need to do is start following the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before your trek begins.
If you are not currently active, follow the below schedule to get trek fit in 6 weeks!

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records
Parents must ensure children below 14 remain physically active and prepared for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records.
However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.

values: You do not enjoy the trek

Fitness records may be rejected if you fail to link your fitness profile or do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month
Without fitness approval 20 days before the trek, you will not be allowed on the trek
